mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phoneOrEmail} OR email = #{phoneOrEmail} OR username = #{phoneOrEmail}
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
